remedy_caveat: Most remedies mitigate, not cure; relocation is the ideal fix. Present remedies with this caveat.

entries.reasoning: Water element aligns N/NE; SE fire clash; SW earth clash (major hard-to-fix); Brahmasthan open.
entries.disagreement: NW allowed(VaastuMangaal) vs avoid(majority); W fine(VaastuMangaal) vs avoid(others); never on NE-SW diagonal.
entries.remedy: Relocate to N/NE or fill+close. SW stuck: paint top yellow (never blue/black/green/brown). Mitigation: copper strips, pyramid, rock salt. No leakage; covered; septic away.
query_aliases: pani ki tanki zameen ke niche kahan
भूमिगत पानी की टंकी की दिशा

entries.reasoning: Heavy mass at height = earth element -> SW; heavy-in-SW rule; NE must stay light.
entries.disagreement: NW fallback(SaralVaastu) vs never(VaastuMangaal); majority avoid NW.
entries.remedy: Shift to SW/W. NE unavoidable: keep small/light, copper/lead strips, add SW counter-mass. Never above kitchen/pooja.

entries.reasoning: Active groundwater = water element; NE Ishanya prosperity; SE fire, SW stability clash; never on Brahmasutra; E/N open for sun.
entries.disagreement: NW majority-avoid vs lesser-evil-vs-SE(ArchitectureIdeas); high-yield wrong bore keep(minority) vs fill+close(mainstream).
entries.remedy: Wrong/dead bore: fill with earth, close, lockable covered slab. Can't close: cover+buffer. Dig before construction; 15-20ft from wall; not touching house walls; away from septic; round shape.

entries.reasoning: Water-element; NE well opens money flow; circular above surface.
entries.disagreement: SubhaVaastu east-of-NE finer-grained.
entries.remedy: Fill/close wrong or dry well; lockable covered slab if cannot close; boundary buffer between house and well.

entries.reasoning: Yama direction deep sleep; head(N-pole)-to-S unlike poles; low BP/longevity claims; small HIMS study cited cautiously.
entries.disagreement: None in vastu. Feng shui opposite (head N). Vastu-scoped.
entries.remedy: na_recommendation
query_aliases: sar kis disha mein sona hai
सोते समय सिर किस दिशा में

entries.reasoning: Rising sun knowledge; memory/focus/career.
entries.disagreement: Ranking only; none call bad.
entries.remedy: na
query_aliases: padhai ke liye sone ki disha

entries.reasoning: PRO fame/ambition/business/guests; ANTI restless dreams/laziness/neutral.
entries.disagreement: Most divided sleep topic; show both sides.
entries.remedy: Switch head to S/E if uneasy; fine for guests as-is.

entries.reasoning: Dead laid head-N; like-poles-repel; restlessness/fatigue/BP/nightmares; avoid NE too.
entries.disagreement: Feng shui recommends N; one study favored N-S axis. Tradition-scoped.
entries.remedy: Rotate the bed (instant zero-cost). Supplementary: sea-salt bowl, lavender.
query_aliases: उत्तर दिशा में सिर क्यों नहीं
north me sir karke kyu nahi sote

entries.reasoning: SW earth/stability heavy bed; solid-wall grounding.
entries.disagreement: SW-corner vs don't-jam -> reconciled SW zone with side space.
entries.remedy: Rotate for head-N; false-ceiling/shift for beam; reposition/cover mirror to N-E; add solid headboard.

entries.reasoning: East knowledge/concentration; W-zone kids room.
entries.disagreement: Some allow S/NW room; East-head uncontested.
entries.remedy: Rotate to head-E; move out of door-line; relocate/cover mirror.

entries.reasoning: NW Vayu transience fits guests.
entries.disagreement: Corner-within-room split; common ground head-S solid wall.
entries.remedy: Prioritise head-S; corner flexible for guests.

entries.disagreement: NW-newlywed prescription vs acceptable; SE-conflict effect-level.
entries.remedy: SE couple bedroom: metal/earth accents, soothing colours, head-S, limit red decor.

entries.reasoning: Primary energy inlet; NE morning sun; N Kubera wealth; E sun first rays.
entries.disagreement: DIRECTION vs PADA: advanced sources say pada (compass grid) decides, not gross direction; South-in-correct-pada fully auspicious, North-in-bad-pada harmful; 'south-facing bad' called a MYTH. Good padas: N3/N4/N5, E3/E4. Bad: E1/E2 Shikhi/Parjanya, NE Shikhi. Engine present 2 layers (beginner direction + 32-pada advanced).
entries.remedy: Avoid SW-facing. Mitigation: brass wire/metal strips at threshold; warm colours (green/blue/brown, no black); Om/Swastika/Ganesh/Lakshmi; plants; toran; partition. Generic mirror/wind-chime don't fix structural pada defects.

entries.reasoning: Blocks negative energy; energetic boundary; retains wealth.
entries.disagreement: None significant.
entries.remedy: Add low marble/wood threshold strip if missing.

entries.disagreement: Door/window NUMBER: even-only(traditional) vs even-or-odd(SubhaVaastu modern). Entrance STEPS: odd-number leaned(Astrotalk/BeautifulHomes). Open clockwise inward(BeautifulHomes).
entries.remedy: Dwar vedha: toran, partition/curtain/jali screen, keep toilet door shut. Mirror-facing-door: relocate. Creak: oil hinges. Replace broken doors.

entries.disagreement: Layout-dependent, less strict; bedroom door N/W/E all cited.
entries.remedy: Reposition bed/curtain for door-bed line or door-door clash.

entries.reasoning: Fire element -> SE Agni; NW air supports fire (fallback).
entries.disagreement: E-zone kitchen acceptable-not-ideal(some) vs just SE/NW(most).
entries.remedy: NE: yellow/red accents+copper ceiling strip, lead strips, crystal grid. SW: saunf-wood+saltwater pot. N: garlic wreath. NW: lemon-sugar dish. Adjust cook/stove facing; keep clean+ventilated.

entries.reasoning: Core fire element -> SE; SE placement makes cook face East.
entries.disagreement: None significant.
entries.remedy: Relocate to SE. Near sink: bone-china vase buffer or divider; max distance.

entries.reasoning: East morning sun health/digestion.
entries.disagreement: Livspace adds 'west ok'; majority E-first N-fallback avoid-S/W.
entries.remedy: Rearrange stove to face E; N acceptable if fixed.

entries.reasoning: Flowing water -> N/NE, opposite SE stove.
entries.disagreement: Livspace 'sink faces SE' is outlier/self-contradicting; consensus N/NE.
entries.remedy: Shift sink/RO to N/NE; if next to stove, divider or bone-china vase buffer.

entries.disagreement: Fridge SW vs W vs S; firm rule = not NE.
entries.remedy: Move fridge out of NE to SW/W; grain storage NE->S/W.

entries.reasoning: NE Ishanya Shiva zone, max solar/divine; S blocks positive energy.
entries.disagreement: Kitchen-adjacency: avoid(JKCement) vs fine(SubhaVaastu). NW not ideal(SubhaVaastu).
entries.remedy: Relocate NE/E/N. Under-stairs->living-room NE/E wall mandir. Toilet wall->decoupled back panel + altar shift 10-15cm. Bedroom-only->NE corner covered, feet not toward it. Dosh: pyramid/copper-strips-E-wall/mirror-NE/Vastu-Dosh-Nivaran-Yantra.

entries.reasoning: Worshipper facing E/N solar/divine alignment.
entries.disagreement: Idol-faces-NE vs idol-faces-W(worshipper-E) vs idol-faces-E/W. Safe ground: worshipper faces E, idol E/W wall, NEVER S.
entries.remedy: Reorient idols to W/NE; raise >=6in; off-wall >=1in; not facing each other or door.

entries.disagreement: Idol height <=9in(most) vs 2-9in vs >=18in(VastuArt). Colour white/cream/light(most) vs yellow+white-golden(VastuArt).
entries.remedy: Remove broken idols; ancestor photos low on S wall; diya->SE; declutter; storage below/beside not above idols.
query_aliases: puja ghar mein kya na rakhe

entries.reasoning: E morning-sun digestion/metabolism; N Kubera; head-of-family faces E.
entries.disagreement: W: ill-health-avoid(TrueVastu,TheVastuPractice) vs fine-for-others(SubhaVaastu,WoodenStreet). S: mostly avoid, SubhaVaastu relaxed. Reconciled: head E; others E/N/W; avoid S.
entries.remedy: Re-orient seating so earner/elder faces E/N; avoid S-facing head seat.
query_aliases: khana khate samay muh kis taraf
kis disha me baith kar khana khaye

entries.reasoning: Dining W/NW prosperity; near/adjacent kitchen same floor; square/rectangle table.
entries.disagreement: Best zone W(NoBroker/TrueVastu) vs E/N-generally(SubhaVaastu, relaxed 'S fine too') vs table-in-W-zone-of-room(TheVastuPractice). Table shape: square/rect consensus, avoid round/oval/hex.
entries.remedy: Can't move: mirror on N/E wall reflecting table (doubles food/prosperity); Vastu pyramid; bright light; fruit/flower bowl; no cracked crockery; partition if facing main door.

entries.reasoning: Heavy furniture SW earth/stability; doors-open-N/E energy inflow; iron/steel almirah W/NW.
entries.disagreement: LuxuryHandicraft NW-or-SW; most SW-primary NW-secondary. Firm: not NE.
entries.remedy: Stuck wrong: declutter internally (clutter=financial blockage), light finish, doors clear the bed, one solid wall behind.

entries.reasoning: N Kubera wealth; opening N/E = wealth in not out; SW stability holds wealth.
entries.disagreement: N-wall-opens-N/E(VedicBirth: never toward N wall itself) vs SW-corner-opens-N(Livspace/InteriorCompany). Agreement: opening faces N/E, never NE, never empty.
entries.remedy: Keep 5-7 silver coins/cash inside (never empty); small mirror inside reflecting valuables (doubles abundance); stable platform.

entries.reasoning: Mirrors=energy amplifiers multiply reflection; N wealth, E clarity; reflecting bed=sleep/health/quarrels; reflecting door=energy repelled.
entries.disagreement: NoBroker 'dressing mirror beside bed excellent' vs universal 'not facing bed' -> beside/perpendicular ok, opposite not. Dining mirror positive exception.
entries.remedy: Reposition to N/E; if fixed opposite bed cover at night; Bagua mirror on bedroom/main door; replace broken; fix flat to wall.

entries.reasoning: E/N concentration+magnetic alignment; SE agni placement boosts focus.
entries.disagreement: Room zone NE vs E/W-of-house-N-second (Astrotalk internal). Facing uncontested: E first N second avoid S/NW.
entries.remedy: Rotate desk to E/N; remove mirror; 3-4in wall gap; Saraswati/Ganesha image + crystal globe.

entries.reasoning: TV electronic/fire-linked SE; glass reflects like mirror (mirror-facing-bed caution).
entries.disagreement: Zone SE(most) vs NW(LuxuryHandicraft TV-unit) vs S-cover-when-off(LuxuryHandicraft mirror-guide). Split; SE most-cited.
entries.remedy: Shift to SE/NW; cover screen when off if facing bed; keep out of bedroom.

entries.reasoning: Heavy furniture S/W walls; occupants face N/E; NE stays light.
entries.disagreement: SW-sofa-facing-E vs S/W-wall-facing-N/E: both keep heavy mass S/W, consistent.
entries.remedy: Rearrange so main seat not back-to-door; move heavy sofa off NE to S/W.

entries.reasoning: Complements SD-05; solid headboard grounding.
entries.disagreement: None major (consistent with SD-05).
entries.remedy: False ceiling/shift for beam; cover/relocate mirror; buffer/shift off toilet wall; switch kids to wooden bed.

entries.domain_note: Least rigid vastu domain; effect-level; low severity.
entries.disagreement: SW: earthy(consensus) vs blue(SMR outlier). NE: light-blue vs white/cream(both light). E: white/light-blue vs green/brown(both light). Universal avoid: black/dark absorbs, grey dullness, red+blue clash.
entries.remedy: Repaint to zone shade or use accents/furnishings/curtains; no structural fix; easiest domain to change.

entries.disagreement: Master bedroom split: earthy-tones(SW-earth logic) vs soothing-pastel(rest logic) - present both. Kitchen(warm) & pooja(light) high consensus.
entries.remedy: Repaint or accents; dark-red bedroom soften with pastel bedding; blue/black kitchen add warm accents.

entries.reasoning: Disposal function -> disposal zones (NW, SW-adjacent), never sacred NE; seat on N-S axis.
entries.disagreement: Best zone NW/W(beginner) vs WNW/SSW/ESE(advanced 16-zone) - gross SW bad but SSW sub-zone good; 2-layer like main-door. SE acceptable(Cera/NoBroker) vs marital/female-health/payment-delay(AppliedVastu/AnjaneyVastu). Under-stairs fine(AppliedVastu) vs avoid(most).
entries.remedy: Door closed; exhaust E/N; sea salt bowl inside; Vastu pyramid outer wall; money/spider/palm plant inside; light colours; slope drainage N/E/NE; commode raised 1-2ft; NE->Yantra/crystals/box; SE->wood+candle image; never share wall with kitchen/pooja.

entries.reasoning: Heavy + up-down movement -> heavy SW/S/W; NE light/open; clockwise = positive flow.
entries.disagreement: Step-count odd-preferred consensus but echoes doors/steps modern-view-count-doesnt-matter split. Minor.
entries.remedy: NE staircase: keep light, add lighting, light finish; symbolic crystals; under-stair clutter-free, no pooja/kitchen; clockwise; good ventilation; no broken treads.

entries.disagreement: See tulsi/money sub-entries.
entries.remedy: Cactus/thorny -> outdoor SW; remove bonsai/dead/artificial; earthen pots; trim dead leaves; odd counts.

entries.disagreement: Best dir NE(Astraroot/UltraTech/Housivity) vs East-ideal(JSWOneHomes/plantsinformation) vs N/NE/E-all-fine(most). NE/E/N all auspicious, NE most-cited.
entries.remedy: Relocate to NE/E raised platform; earthen pot; keep healthy; away from toilet/stairs.

entries.note: SE=wealth(Venus/Ganesha), N=Kubera/career; SE+N opposite-corners balance; clockwise growth; keep bushy.
entries.disagreement: Money-plant-SE vs SE-is-fire reconciled: SE is standard wealth placement (Venus rules SE for this). Firm avoid: NE+SW.
entries.remedy: Relocate to SE or N; clockwise growth; away from red; healthy/bushy.
Relocate to N/E side wall; if fixed angle/cover; Bagua mirror is different protective use (small, outside door).

entries.reasoning: Vehicles = movement/Vayu -> NW; SE acceptable.
entries.disagreement: Dedicated parking-vastu sources thin this pass; documented at lower confidence per instruction; optional future top-up.
entries.remedy: Shift heavy vehicle out of NE to NW/SE; keep NE light/open.

entries.note: Foundation for all room placement reasoning.

entries.reasoning: Room element matches zone: fire-rooms SE, heavy/rest SW, sacred/light NE, disposal NW/SW-adjacent, wealth N; Brahmasthan open.
entries.disagreement: Children W-vs-NW; guest NW-vs-E/SE; study W-vs-NE-vs-E; center-pooja minority(AppliedVastu) vs keep-open(most). Main-door/toilet/staircase carry own pada/16-zone splits (DE-01,MI-01,MI-02).
entries.remedy: Change room-usage not walls (NE bedroom->pooja; SW room->master); pyramids/yantras; crystals in SW; sea-salt NE toilet; partition incompatible zones; colour/lighting; plants; extend deficient corners; keep Brahmasthan clear.

rules: SE=Agni: kitchen/fire, not UG-water not pooja
SW=earth/heavy: master bed+heaviest furniture, never empty, not kitchen/water/toilet-pit
entries.note: Engine should surface these prominently; violations = major dosh, near-universal consensus.

Sub-project beneath Cat1 room-zone layer. Room-zone matrix (RZ-01) answers practical search queries; pada layer adds per-cell expert precision (cf main-door DE-01), build incrementally post-launch. NOT one of the 10 top-level categories.
